description: Style NoteBuckles never looked more stylish than in this strappy pair from catwalk. Tough black straps with shiny metal buckles - what's not to love? This versatile pair can be worn in a zillion different ways. The best look we can think of is with an LBD!Product DetailsBlack sandals with forefoot, midfoot and ankle straps with a tang clasp detail with crystal embellishments. Also has a heel collar with a zipper closureSmooth footbed with branding embossed on the heelPlastic outsole with textured rubber grooves on the forefoot and a heelMaterial and CarePlastic and syntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlightSizeHeel: 3.5& rdquo
